디모데후서 4:1.content: I command you therefore before God and the Lord Jesus Christ, who will judge the living and the dead at his appearing and his Kingdom:

디모데후서 4:2.content: preach the word; be urgent in season and out of season; reprove, rebuke, and exhort with all patience and teaching.

디모데후서 4:3.content: For the time will come when they will not listen to the sound doctrine, but having itching ears, will heap up for themselves teachers after their own lusts,

디모데후서 4:4.content: and will turn away their ears from the truth, and turn away to fables.

디모데후서 4:5.content: But you be sober in all things, suffer hardship, do the work of an evangelist, and fulfill your ministry.

디모데후서 4:6.content: For I am already being offered, and the time of my departure has come.

디모데후서 4:7.content: I have fought the good fight. I have finished the course. I have kept the faith.

디모데후서 4:8.content: From now on, the crown of righteousness is stored up for me, which the Lord, the righteous judge, will give to me on that day; and not to me only, but also to all those who have loved his appearing.

디모데후서 4:9.content: Be diligent to come to me soon,

디모데후서 4:10.content: for Demas left me, having loved this present world, and went to Thessalonica; Crescens to Galatia; and Titus to Dalmatia.

디모데후서 4:11.content: Only Luke is with me. Take Mark, and bring him with you, for he is useful to me for service.

디모데후서 4:12.content: But I sent Tychicus to Ephesus.

디모데후서 4:13.content: Bring the cloak that I left at Troas with Carpus when you come, and the books, especially the parchments.

디모데후서 4:14.content: Alexander, the coppersmith, did much evil to me. The Lord will repay him according to his deeds,

디모데후서 4:15.content: of whom you also must beware; for he greatly opposed our words.

디모데후서 4:16.content: At my first defense, no one came to help me, but all left me. May it not be held against them.

디모데후서 4:17.content: But the Lord stood by me and strengthened me, that through me the message might be fully proclaimed, and that all the Gentiles might hear. So I was delivered out of the mouth of the lion.

디모데후서 4:18.content: And the Lord will deliver me from every evil work, and will preserve me for his heavenly Kingdom. To him be the glory forever and ever. Amen.

디모데후서 4:19.content: Greet Prisca and Aquila, and the house of Onesiphorus.

디모데후서 4:20.content: Erastus remained at Corinth, but I left Trophimus at Miletus sick.

디모데후서 4:21.content: Be diligent to come before winter. Eubulus salutes you, as do Pudens, Linus, Claudia, and all the brothers.

디모데후서 4:22.content: The Lord Jesus Christ be with your spirit. Grace be with you. Amen.
